emails.subject: Re: Rudy, Rudy, Rudy
emails.body: Re: Rudy, Rudy, Rudy i think you see the writing on the wall that we are going to dominate. who cares about the last two years, it is about now. we are going to rope-a-dope ya.

emails.subject: Re: Rudy, Rudy, Rudy
emails.body: Re: Rudy, Rudy, Rudy Ya nknow, every year it is the same thing with you guys....we are going to dominate....we are the best. The problem is you never deliver. PL
